title: Peppery Australian Pork Belly Crisp Slices
description: A spicy and flavorful dish perfect for a date night featuring crispy pork belly slices drizzled with a peppery glaze.
instructions: Cut pork belly into thick slices, about 1cm thick.
Season both sides of the pork with salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper. Let it marinate for at least an hour or up to overnight in a plastic bag in the refrigerator.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Place pork belly slices in the hot skillet and cook on each side until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side. Remove from pan and set aside.
To make the peppery glaze, mix together salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and a pinch of cayenne pepper in a small bowl. Drizzle over cooked pork belly slices while still warm.
Serve immediately as a snack or appetizer.
